name: Session-End Compliance Sweep
description: Tier B (agentStop): Fires the session-end-compliance-agent (SEC__) after every agent session. Consolidates all advisory checks into one pass. Disable this hook to switch to manual-only invocation via SEC__.

then.prompt: Execute the Session-End Compliance Agent (SEC__) as defined in `.kiro/agents/session-end-compliance-agent.md`. Run all applicable Tier B checks against files modified during this session and produce the consolidated report. Follow the agent's full protocol (territory exclusion → phase/tier check → 6 checks → output → compliance log).
